ab: auwa u i iyan?
ch: A:你要去哪裡?
en: A: Where are you going?

ab: auwa ku i padurina’an semalema za kulang.
ch: B:我要去菜園裡種菜。
en: B: I’m going to plant vegetables in the garden.

ab: makuda u?
ch: A:你在做什麼?
en: A: What are you doing?

ab: traluwalun lra zi remarevay ku, nu haremay mu puwazanum ku.
ch: B:草太多了，我在除草，等一下要澆水。
en: B: There’s too much grass, I’m mowing, I’ll have to water it later.

ab: alakanay ku za ringaw zi pitaw mu?
ch: A:幫我把鐮刀和鋤頭拿來好嗎?
en: A: Will you get my scythes and hoes, please?

ab: nu tra’anay i iyan ziya maw?
ch: B:你放在哪裡呢?
en: B: Where did you put it?

ab: ulra ipuwa kana kangkang zi dipdip i ngidiran.
ch: A:放在犁耙旁邊。
en: A: Put it next to the plow rake.

ab: nu vuliyasaw lra na dare’?
ch: A:你翻過土了嗎?
en: A: Did you turn over the soil?

ab: maw ku ziya vulaliyas kana dare’, nu haremay ’apiyar ku lra.
ch: B:我剛翻過土，等等要播種。
en: B: I just turned over the soil, and so on to sow seeds.

ab: nanu isalem na kulang aruwa ta lra kikulang?
ch: A:你種的菜可以收成了嗎?
en: A: Are your vegetables ready to be harvested?

ab: na i kania na tamana mu aruwa lra, na i kaziyu na tangungu mu ’azi ziya kararuwa kikulang.
ch: B:這裡的高麗菜可以收成了，那裡的昭和草就還不能收成。
en: B: The cabbage here is ready to be harvested, but the Showa grass there is not yet ready to be harvested.

ab: wa! nu kivurasiyaw a sakuniyani sazu a vurasi.
ch: A:哇!你挖了這麼多的地瓜。
en: A: Wow! You dug up so many gourds.

ab: pulralrangay ku puwa i suru mu?
ch: B:幫我放穀倉好嗎?
en: B: Will you help me with the barn?

ab: kemakuda mu?
ch: A:你們在做什麼?
en: A: What are you doing?

ab: papuwa mi za ’aray za kiyavulraw.
ch: B:我們在放漁網抓魚。
en: B: We’re releasing fishing nets to catch fish.

ab: sazu a vulraw i kani?
ch: A:這裡的魚多嗎?
en: A: Are there many fish here?

ab: sazu lra nanta kinivulraw ulra i savak kana kari’is.
ch: B:魚簍裡已經裝了很多我們抓的魚。
en: B: The fish traps are already full of fish that we caught.

ab: nu mukuwa u kivulrawa mu kemuda u kivulraw?
ch: A:你去抓魚時怎麼抓的?
en: A: How do you catch fish when you go to catch them?

ab: mitatusuk ku temusuk kana vulraw.
ch: B:我都用魚叉射魚。
en: B: I shoot fish with a spear.

ab: sayhu u penana’ kana makazenan na haramehaman?
ch: A:你會用弓箭打山上的動物嗎?
en: A: Do you shoot at the animals on the mountain with a bow and arrow?

ab: inku mu penapetrir kirawa, nueman mu mikuwang ku zi mada ku za suwan mukuwa pa’alrupa.
ch: B:我通常都是用陷阱抓獵物，偶爾也會拿槍帶狗圍獵。
en: B: I usually catch my prey with a trap, but occasionally I will fence with a gun and a dog.

ab: tu wakalr za vavuy inia.
ch: A:這是山豬所走的路。
en: A: This is the road the boar took.

ab: mazu mazalram u?
ch: B:你怎麼知道呢?
en: B: How do you know?

ab: nintu dinapalran za vavuy inia, maw izu na inia mu tu wakalr za vavuy.
ch: A:這是山豬的腳印，所以這是山豬所走的路。
en: A: These are the footprints of the boar, so this is the path the boar took.

ab: pakunamun uwa na’uwi nanta petrir, kamawan za karasa lra za rawa.
ch: A:快去看我們的陷阱，好像抓到獵物了。
en: A: Go and see our trap, for it seems that we have caught our prey.

ab: mazu mazalram u?
ch: B:你怎麼知道呢?
en: B: How do you know?

ab: na suwan kamawan za tremaulr. pakunamuna ta kurelrang mukuwa.
ch: A:狗好像聞到味道了。我們快跟過去。
en: A: The dog seems to have smelled it. Let’s follow them.

ab: eman nanu dinadaway harem?
ch: A:你正在製作的是什麼東西?
en: A: What are you working on?

ab: inia mu maw na varasa’ na demadepel na petrir, papetrir za tutus.
ch: B:這是石壓式陷阱，用來抓老鼠。
en: B: This is a stone trap, used to catch rats.

ab: a eman nanu ipuwa i kazu?
ch: A:你放在那裡的是什麼東西?
en: A: What is that thing you put there?

ab: izua mu maw na venetatevet kana kuwi na petrir, niniyam papetrir za ’ura.
ch: B:那是套腳式繩索陷阱，我們用它來抓山羌。
en: B: It was a leg-rigged rope trap, and we used it to catch Shankiang.

ab: lrayuwan kemaya ta semungal kana ta temuwamuwan za tu ipuvavate kaninta, sazu ta kinarasa na rawa harem kana wari.
ch: A:感謝祖靈賜福，今天我們有很多獵物收獲。
en: A: Thanks to the blessing of our ancestors, we had a great harvest today.

ab: ai! ta adayaw muruma’ i zekalr ta kara’aru’arusaw.
ch:
B:是啊!我們帶回部落
一起分享吧!
en: B: Yeah! We bring back the tribe. Let’s share!
